Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KATHERINE PAPAGEORGE , SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE 1996 PAPAGEORGE FAMILY TRUST's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-23-673022 WITH CASE CGC-24-612829.

Plaintiff's motion to consolidate this action CGC-24-612829 (wrongful foreclosure) with CUD-23-673022 (unlawful detainer) or alternatively stay the unlawful detainer is denied as moot. The court stayed the unlawful detainer in the companion motion. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
